    "Unfilled void behind the trench shield/box"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Backfill and compact the void space between the trench shield and the excavation face to prevent lateral movement and cave-ins"
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1926 Subpart P Appendix B and standard trench shield installation guidelines require that the space between the trench shield and the excavated face be backfilled or minimized to prevent lateral movement of the shield and to prevent cave-ins from sloughing into the void, which can cause sudden impact loads on the shield.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart P Appendix B",
    "OSHA 1926.652"
  ]
}
